# Daily Report — 2026-07-16

## Task Completed
Added `create_on_call_rotation` tool (POST cmn_rota). Supports required `name` field plus optional
`group`, `active`, `description`, `manager`, `schedule`, `escalation`, and `type` fields.
Boolean `active` is serialised as a string for the ServiceNow API. Tool registered in
`system_administrator` and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2283
- Coverage: 100% (on_call_tools.py)
- All passing: yes

## Security
Clean — no vulnerabilities detected by pip-audit.
